hooks.command:
python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); checklist='PRE-COMMIT CHECKLIST (CLAUDE.md) -- verify each was run this session:
1. uv run ruff format .
2. uv run ruff check . --fix
3. uv run pytest
4. CHANGELOG.md updated under [Unreleased]
5. uv run sphinx-build -W -E -b html docs docs/_build/html  (if notebooks/ or src/stamp/ changed)
If any step was skipped, stop and complete it first.'; print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PreToolUse','additionalContext':checklist}})) if 'git commit' in cmd else None" 2>/dev/null || true

python -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); branch=subprocess.check_output(['git','branch','--show-current'],text=True).strip() if 'gh pr create' in cmd else ''; print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PreToolUse','permissionDecision':'deny','permissionDecisionReason':f'Current branch is \"{branch}\". PRs must be opened from a feature branch, not {branch}. Run: git checkout -b feat/<name>'}})) if branch in ('main','master') else None" 2>/dev/null || true

python -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); r1=subprocess.run(['git','checkout','main'],capture_output=True,text=True); r2=subprocess.run(['git','pull'],capture_output=True,text=True); out=(r1.stdout+r1.stderr+r2.stdout+r2.stderr).strip(); print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':'Switched to main and pulled: '+out}})) if 'gh pr merge' in cmd else None" 2>/dev/null || true

python -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); [subprocess.run(['uv','run','ruff']+args+[f]) for args in [['format'],['check','--fix']]] if f and f.endswith('.py') else None" 2>/dev/null || true
